name: Lex Resiliens Open Framework Core
description: Core definition for LR-Open: six resilience functions + KRI_X index.

R.name: Resource Resilience
R.description: Energy, materials, food, water, logistics – ability to sustain physical basics.

S.name: Social & Systemic Resilience
S.description: Human well-being, trust, institutions, psychological stability, fairness.

E.name: Ecological & Economic Resilience
E.description: Ecological limits, long-term productivity, climate impact, financial stability.

scale.description: Discrete resilience scale from -3 (critical failure) to +3 (strongly resilient).

functions.name: Resource & Systems Matrix
functions.description: Energy, materials, and basic infrastructure resilience.

functions.name: Risk & Revenue Management
functions.description: Funding flows, risk exposure, political capture risk.

functions.name: Technical & Service Matrix
functions.description: Technical performance, innovation spillover, critical services.

functions.name: Information & Risk Signalling
functions.description: Honesty of communication and early warning.

kri_index.name: Key Resilience Index
kri_index.description: Aggregated index combining R, S and E components.

vrf_lock.name: 48h VRF Lock
vrf_lock.description: If KRI_X is Critical or Fragile, trigger 48h lock.
